title: Minuartia skorpilii
taxonomy: Minuartia skorpilii is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is classified as a member of the genus Minuartia, which is a group of low-growing, annual or perennial plants. The genus Minuartia is often referred to as the "rock purses" due to the shape of their seed capsules. The classification of Minuartia skorpilii places it within the order Caryophyllales, which is a group of flowering plants characterized by five-petaled flowers. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula.
